description:
Farm Steam trading cards, manage achievements, and idle games automatically — an all-in-one alternative to ArchiSteamFarm, Steam Achievement Manager, and Idle Master

Steam Game Idler (SGI) is a Steam automation tool for farming trading cards, managing achievements, and boosting playtime across all games in your Steam library.
What's Changed
- refactor: add sort dropdown to custom lists by @zevnda in #1660
- feat(auto-idler): add per-game checkbox toggle by @zevnda in #1661
- feat: add keyboard shortcuts and keybinds settings tab by @zevnda in #1662
- feat(tauri): prevent multiple instances by @zevnda in #1663
- build(deps): bump deps by @zevnda in #1665
Full Changelog: 5.1.0...5.1.1
